auditObjective: Verify deployed bytecode/source match through BaseScan-verified artifacts.
Confirm fixed supply and no post-deployment minting.
Confirm no owner/admin role, proxy, upgrade path, blacklist, pause, transfer tax, hidden fee, custody, or withdrawal path.
Review ERC-20 transfer and allowance behavior.

publicClaimState.allowedPublicClaim: No third-party audit has been completed. Internal engineering review and BaseScan source verification are complete.

auditorShortlist.name: QuillAudits
auditorShortlist.fit: cost and turnaround sensitive ERC-20 audit quote

submissionLog.name: QuillAudits
submissionLog.evidence: Contact form showed: Form submitted successfully! We'll be in touch soon. API response returned success=true with id=69ff764fef9d6e0aa30257f6.
submissionLog.notes: The pricing calculator estimated USD 1000, but the ERP pricing endpoint required an access token, so the contact form was used for the real quote request.

submissionLog.name: Hacken
submissionLog.evidence: The form confirmation showed: Thank you! We've received your request! Our team is reviewing your information and will be in touch shortly.
submissionLog.notes: Submitted as a Crypto-Native project in Asia Pacific with the official Telegram handle.

submissionLog.name: OpenZeppelin
submissionLog.evidence: The HubSpot form accepted the submission and returned conversionId=9b09cc7a-a53b-44b9-9763-98ac7e482434. The page showed: Thank you! We received your request.
submissionLog.notes: Requested a smart-contract security audit, set expected completion date to 2026-06-30, and provided repository, documentation, scope, Solidity language, and Telegram handle.

nextRequiredOwnerAction: Monitor GCAgochina@outlook.com and Telegram for auditor replies, compare quote price/timeline/report terms, then approve one auditor and any required payment before claiming a third-party audit.
